---
title: "FinSight — Market Intelligence Agent"
description: "An agentic RAG system for financial analysis powered by Claude"
categories: [AI, Finance, Python]
date: 2026-03-11
---

## Overview
One paragraph on what the project does and why.

## Architecture
The ASCII diagram from your README works well here, or a Mermaid diagram:

```{mermaid}
graph LR
  U[User question] --> A[Claude claude-sonnet-4-6]
  A -->|get_indicators| S[(DuckDB\nprices · technicals · fundamentals)]
  A -->|search_news| R[(ChromaDB\nnews embeddings)]
  S --> A
  R --> A
  A --> O[Structured analysis]
```

## Key design decisions
- Why MCP (vs direct function calls)
- Why DuckDB + ChromaDB together
- How the agentic loop works

## Try it

<iframe src="https://huggingface.co/spaces/margotbtn/finsight"
  width="100%" height="700px" style="border:none; border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>

## Code
[GitHub repo](https://github.com/...)
